en.title: Best Portable Chargers 2026
en.description: Anker Prime 250W, Anker 737, UGREEN Nexode 200W, Baseus PicoGo Qi2.2, plus the rest of the power banks worth carrying in 2026, ranked by usable Wh, real PD 3.1 output, and how much friction the cable situation actually adds to your day.

zh-tw.title: 最佳行動電源 2026
zh-tw.description: Anker Prime 250W、Anker 737、UGREEN Nexode 200W、Baseus PicoGo Qi2.2，以及 2026 年值得帶出門的其他行動電源，這份排行用實際可用 Wh、真正的 PD 3.1 輸出、還有那條線到底會不會煩死你來排序。

en.description: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh airline-legal laptop power bank with 250W combined PD 3.1 output across two USB-C ports plus one USB-A, color display, and full Anker app integration with smart charging and locator alerts.

zh-tw.description: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh 過得了航空安檢的筆電行動電源，兩個 USB-C 加一個 USB-A 合計 250W PD 3.1 輸出，彩色螢幕，完整支援 Anker App 智慧充電和遺失警報。

en.description: 24,000mAh GaNPrime power bank with 140W PD 3.1 output, dual USB-C plus USB-A, and a smart digital display showing live input/output and recharge time.

zh-tw.description: 24,000mAh GaNPrime 行動電源，140W PD 3.1 輸出，雙 USB-C 加一個 USB-A，智慧螢幕即時顯示輸入輸出功率和回充剩餘時間。

en.description: 25,000mAh / 90Wh power bank with two USB-C ports rated 140W and 100W, USB-A 18W, combined 200W PD 3.1 output, automotive-grade 21700 cells, 13-layer protection, and a TFT smart display.

zh-tw.description: 25,000mAh / 90Wh 行動電源，兩個 USB-C 分別最高 140W 和 100W，USB-A 18W，雙 USB-C 並用合計 200W PD 3.1 輸出，車規級 21700 鋰電芯，13 層保護機制，配備 TFT 智慧顯示螢幕。

competitors.name: Anker Nano Power Bank (10K, 30W, Built-in USB-C Cable)

en.description: 10,000mAh pocket power bank with built-in USB-C cable doubling as a strap, 30W PD output across the integrated cable, USB-C port, and USB-A port, with an 80% recycled-plastic body.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh 口袋行動電源，內建 USB-C 線兼當吊繩，30W PD 輸出可走內建線、USB-C 孔或 USB-A 孔，外殼 80% 後消費回收塑膠。

competitors.name: Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 Magnetic Power Bank (10K)

en.description: 10,000mAh Qi2.2 25W magnetic power bank with 45W USB-C built-in cable, alloy chassis at 16mm thick, triple-cooling system, and 30W input that fully recharges the unit in roughly 90 minutes.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh Qi2.2 25W 磁吸行動電源，內建 45W USB-C 線，鋁合金機身厚度 16mm，三重散熱系統，30W 輸入大約 90 分鐘可回充滿電。

en.description: 10,000mAh Qi2-certified 15W MagSafe-compatible power bank with 27W USB-C wired output, foldable kickstand, smart display, and ActiveShield temperature monitoring at 3 million checks per day.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh Qi2 認證 15W MagSafe 相容行動電源，有線 USB-C 輸出 27W，可折疊立架，智慧螢幕，ActiveShield 安全系統每天偵測溫度三百萬次。

competitors.name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Magnetic Power Bank (Qi2 15W)

en.description: 10,000mAh Qi2 15W magnetic power bank with integrated pop-up kickstand, 72% post-consumer recycled plastic shell, included 1m USB-C cable, two-year warranty plus a $2,500 connected equipment guarantee.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh Qi2 15W 磁吸行動電源，內建彈出式立架，72% 後消費回收塑膠外殼，附 1 公尺 USB-C 線，兩年保固再加 75,000 元台幣的連接裝置保險。

competitors.name: INIU 20,000mAh 45W Power Bank with Built-in USB-C Cable

en.description: 20,000mAh TinyCell power bank with integrated USB-C cable, 45W PD output, additional USB-C and USB-A ports for triple simultaneous charging, TSA-compliant for carry-on, plus a 3-year warranty.

zh-tw.description: 20,000mAh TinyCell 行動電源，內建 USB-C 線，45W PD 輸出，多一個 USB-C 和一個 USB-A 孔可三孔同時充，過得了航空托運安檢，附三年保固。

en.description: 25,000mAh laptop-class power bank with three USB-C PD ports, up to 100W single-port output and 120W combined, fabric-wrapped chassis, and Apple Find My integration for tracking.

zh-tw.description: 25,000mAh 筆電級行動電源，三個 USB-C PD 孔，單孔最高 100W、三孔合計 120W，布面外殼，整合 Apple Find My 可追蹤定位。

en.description: 26,800mAh / 96.48Wh power bank with four USB-C ports including two 100W and 60W PD outputs, OLED display, and firmware that updates over USB-C to keep up with new device protocols.

zh-tw.description: 26,800mAh / 96.48Wh 行動電源，四個 USB-C 孔，其中兩個分別支援 100W 和 60W PD 輸出，OLED 螢幕，韌體可透過 USB-C 更新跟上新裝置協議。

references.title: The best power banks and portable chargers for every device in 2026
The best portable chargers of 2026, tried and tested
Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 batteries review

en.commentary:
Buying a power bank in 2026 is a different shopping problem than it was even two years ago. PD 3.1 finally pushed the laptop-class category from 100W into 140W and 250W territory, USB-A ports stopped being a useful tiebreaker, and built-in USB-C cables turned from a convenience into the deciding feature for everyday carry. I ranked these the way I actually shop, by usable watt-hours first, real PD 3.1 output second, the cable situation third, and only then by sticker price.

Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W takes first because it is the only mainstream power bank that pushes a 16-inch MacBook Pro at the laptop's full 140W input while still leaving 110W for two phones charging simultaneously. The 99.56Wh rating is the maximum the FAA lets you carry on a plane. The Anker app integration is the most polished smart-charging software I have used, and the locator alert genuinely saves you when the brick falls behind a hotel bed. At $179.99 it costs more than the 737, but it is the right answer if you treat your power bank as the single device you cannot leave home without.

Anker 737 PowerCore 24K (140W) takes second and is the smarter purchase for almost everyone who does not need 250W. 24,000mAh of capacity, 140W PD 3.1 across the primary USB-C port, a smart display that shows real input and output wattage, and a $109.99 price that has held steady for two years. GaNPrime internals run measurably cooler than older PowerCore designs, which extends battery cycle life. The 737 is at two only because the Prime 250W has more headroom for laptops, otherwise this is the best capacity-per-dollar premium pick on the market.

UGREEN Nexode 25,000mAh 200W at three is the value champion of 2026. $99 buys you 25,000mAh / 90Wh, 140W single-port output, automotive-grade 21700 cells, and a TFT display that does almost everything Anker's app does without needing a phone connection. The 13-layer safety protection is real engineering, not marketing language. It loses to the Anker Prime only on app polish and to the 737 only on chassis size. If you are buying your first laptop-class power bank and Anker prices feel offensive, this is the answer.

Anker Nano Power Bank (10K, 30W) at four wins the everyday-carry category outright. The integrated USB-C cable doubles as the wrist strap, which is the most genuinely thoughtful piece of industrial design in any power bank under $50. 30W is enough to fast-charge an iPhone 17, an iPad mini, or a M-series MacBook Air at usable speed. 10,000mAh covers two full iPhone charges with margin. At $45 it is the power bank I tell every non-technical friend to buy and stop overthinking it.

Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 at five is the right pick for any iPhone 16 or 17 owner who actually charges wirelessly. 25W Qi2.2 is the new ceiling, double the old MagSafe limit, and the AM52 is one of the few power banks certified at this speed. The built-in 45W USB-C cable means you can charge an iPad Air at full speed while the iPhone sits magnetically on the back. 16mm thick is genuinely pocketable. The reason it sits at five rather than three is the 10,000mAh cap, you get one and a half iPhone charges before you need a wall.

Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 at six is the right answer for iPhone 12 through 15 owners who will not benefit from Qi2.2 25W. 15W Qi2 is still the iPhone 15 ceiling regardless of what power bank you buy, and the MagGo's foldable stand and 27W USB-C wired output cover the wired side better than the Belkin. ActiveShield monitoring is the genuine technical advance over the previous generation. At $71.99 it undercuts the Belkin by $28 and gives up almost nothing.

Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Qi2 at seven loses to the Anker MagGo on price and gains on industrial design. The pop-up kickstand is sturdier than Anker's, the 72% recycled chassis is the most environmentally serious build in the magnetic category, and the $2,500 connected equipment warranty is the only one I trust. Buy it if you want a kickstand-first design and the Belkin name carries weight in your IT department.

INIU 20,000mAh 45W with built-in cable at eight is the budget-tier answer that genuinely punches above its weight. $37 for 20,000mAh and 45W PD with an integrated USB-C cable is unprecedented pricing, and the TinyCell battery technology genuinely shrinks the chassis below comparable Anker units. The reason it is at eight rather than four is the brand support track record and the lack of any meaningful smart-charging app. If you treat power banks as disposable accessories that cost less than a dinner, this is the obvious purchase.

Mophie Powerstation Pro XL 25K (100W) at nine is the right answer for the Apple ecosystem buyer who values fabric finish, Find My integration, and the Apple Store premium experience. Three USB-C ports at 100W combined is real laptop-class output. The reason it is at nine rather than three is the $149.95 price for performance the UGREEN Nexode delivers at $99 with 200W output. Buy this if Find My on a power bank matters to you, otherwise the UGREEN is the rational choice.

Zendure SuperTank Pro 26,800mAh 100W at ten is the niche pick for the user who actually needs four USB-C ports simultaneously. Firmware updates over USB-C is a feature I have only seen Zendure ship at this price. At $199 in 2026 the value math no longer works because the Anker Prime 250W and UGREEN Nexode 200W both push more total wattage at lower prices. Buy the SuperTank Pro only if you genuinely need four USB-C devices charging from one brick, otherwise pick a competitor with two ports and more headroom.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W is the power bank I would buy in 2026 if I had to pick one
highlights.body: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh is the maximum FAA carry-on capacity, the 250W combined PD 3.1 output drives a 16-inch MacBook Pro at full 140W input while still leaving 110W for two phones, and the Anker app integration with locator alerts is the most polished smart-charging software in the category. The color display shows real input and output wattage, not the made-up percentages most banks display. At $179.99 it costs more than the 737 but solves a different problem: it is the only single device that handles a laptop, two phones, and a tablet from one airport bench.

highlights.title: PD 3.1 changed what a laptop-class power bank means and only three units have caught up
highlights.body: USB-C PD 3.1 lifted the per-port ceiling from 100W to 240W in late 2024, and the market took eighteen months to ship power banks that actually deliver above 140W. The Anker Prime 250W, Anker 737 140W, and UGREEN Nexode 200W are the three power banks I trust to fast-charge a 16-inch MacBook Pro at the laptop's full input rate. Anything labeled '100W max' in 2026 is a compromise the market no longer needs to make. If you are spending more than $80 on a power bank, the answer is one of these three or the math does not work out.

highlights.title: Built-in USB-C cables are the new minimum for everyday carry
highlights.body: The Anker Nano 10K, INIU 20,000mAh, and Baseus PicoGo all ship with integrated USB-C cables, and the daily-use difference compared to a separate cable is enormous. You eliminate the loose-cable failure mode where you forget the cable on the kitchen counter and end up with a brick of useless lithium in your bag. The integrated cable also doubles as a strap on the Anker Nano, which is the kind of genuinely thoughtful design that justifies brand premium. In 2026 a power bank without a built-in cable is asking you to carry two accessories where one would do.

highlights.title: Qi2.2 at 25W only matters for iPhone 16 and 17, every other iPhone caps at 15W Qi2
highlights.body: Apple gates wireless charging speed at the iPhone level, not the power bank level. iPhone 12 through 15 are hardware-capped at 15W regardless of what Qi2.2 power bank you connect. iPhone 16 and 17 are the only iPhones that benefit from the Baseus PicoGo AM52's 25W ceiling. If you have an iPhone 15 or older, the Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 at $71.99 gives you the same effective wireless charging speed as the $79.99 Baseus and saves you the upgrade cost. Match your power bank to your phone, not to the spec sheet.

highlights.title: Skip USB-A ports and 18,650 cells, both belong to the previous generation
highlights.body: Power banks built around 18,650 cylindrical cells are still everywhere on Amazon at $30 to $60, and they are slow to charge themselves, slow to charge your phone, and physically larger than 21700 or pouch-cell equivalents at the same Wh. USB-A ports survive on power banks for backwards compatibility with old cables, but every modern phone, laptop, tablet, and AirPods case takes USB-C. Buy a 2026 power bank with 21700 cells, USB-C-only output, and PD 3.1 support, or you are buying yesterday's product at this year's price. The only exception is if a free USB-A port lets you use the cable already in your bag, in which case the trade is fine for 18 months and then you upgrade.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年買行動電源跟兩年前已經是完全不同的事情了。PD 3.1 終於把筆電級行動電源從 100W 推到 140W、甚至 250W 的境界，USB-A 孔不再是判斷依據，內建 USB-C 線從附加便利變成日常隨身的決勝關鍵。這份排行我是用實際買的角度排的，先看可用瓦時數、再看真正的 PD 3.1 輸出、第三看那條線怎麼處理，最後才看標價。

Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W 排第一，因為它是市面上唯一一台真的能用 16 吋 MacBook Pro 滿載 140W 輸入快充、同時還能留 110W 給兩支手機一起充的主流行動電源。99.56Wh 剛好卡在美國 FAA 規定能上飛機的最高容量。Anker App 整合是這個品類最完整的智慧充電軟體，找電源警報這個功能在飯店床底找東西時真的會救你一命。台幣五千八雖然比 737 貴，但如果你把行動電源當成出門前唯一不能忘記的裝置，答案就是它。

Anker 737 PowerCore 24K（140W）排第二，是大多數不需要 250W 的人更聰明的選擇。24,000mAh 容量、主 USB-C 孔 140W PD 3.1、智慧螢幕顯示真實的輸入輸出瓦數、台幣三千五的價格已經穩定兩年。GaNPrime 內部設計實測比舊款 PowerCore 涼很多，電池循環壽命會更長。會排第二只是因為 Prime 250W 對筆電還有更多餘裕，不然這就是市面上每台幣容量最強的高端首選。

UGREEN Nexode 25,000mAh 200W 排第三，是 2026 年的 CP 值之王。台幣三千二給你 25,000mAh / 90Wh、單孔 140W 輸出、車規級 21700 鋰電芯、TFT 螢幕做到 Anker App 八成的功能但完全不用接手機。13 層安全保護是真材實料的工程設計，不是行銷話術。輸給 Anker Prime 只在 App 細膩度、輸給 737 只在機身大小。第一次買筆電級行動電源、又覺得 Anker 報價有點傷的人，就買它。

Anker Nano Power Bank（10K, 30W）排第四，毫無懸念拿下日常隨身組冠軍。內建的 USB-C 線同時當吊繩用，這是台幣 1500 以下行動電源裡最有誠意的工業設計。30W 足夠把 iPhone 17、iPad mini、或 M 系列 MacBook Air 快充到實用速度。10,000mAh 充兩支 iPhone 還有餘裕。台幣 1,490 是我會直接叫所有非技術背景朋友閉著眼買、別再糾結的那台。

Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 排第五，是有 iPhone 16 或 17 又真的會用無線充電的人該選的。25W Qi2.2 是新的天花板，舊的 MagSafe 上限的兩倍，AM52 是少數通過這個速度認證的行動電源之一。內建 45W USB-C 線代表你可以一邊讓 iPhone 磁吸在背面充、一邊用線拉出來幫 iPad Air 滿速快充。16mm 機身真的塞得進口袋。會排第五而不是第三是因為 10,000mAh 的容量上限，iPhone 充一次半就要找牆插了。

Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 排第六，是 iPhone 12 到 15 用戶該選的那一台，因為 Qi2.2 25W 對你的手機沒用。15W Qi2 仍然是 iPhone 15 以下的硬體上限，不管你買什麼行動電源都一樣，MagGo 的折疊立架和 27W USB-C 有線輸出在線材這邊比 Belkin 更實用。ActiveShield 偵測是這代相對上一代真正的技術升級。台幣 1,990 比 Belkin 便宜將近一千，幾乎沒有任何損失。

Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Qi2 排第七，價格輸給 Anker MagGo，工業設計贏回來。彈出式立架比 Anker 的更穩，72% 回收外殼是磁吸品類裡最認真做環保的，七萬五千元的連接裝置保險是這個業界唯一我會信的保固。如果你看重立架第一、Belkin 名字在你公司 IT 部門有份量，就買它。

INIU 20,000mAh 45W 內建線版本排第八，是預算組裡真的會打破天花板的選擇。台幣 1,200 給你 20,000mAh、45W PD、內建 USB-C 線是史無前例的價格，TinyCell 電池技術讓機身比同容量 Anker 還小。會排第八不是第四是因為品牌長期支援紀錄較薄、沒有真正可用的智慧充電 App。如果你把行動電源當成比一頓晚餐還便宜的耗材在用，那這就是直接該買的版本。

Mophie Powerstation Pro XL 25K（100W）排第九，是 Apple 生態系用戶看重布面外殼、Find My 整合、Apple Store 高級體驗的人該選的。三個 USB-C 合計 100W 確實是筆電級輸出。會排第九不是第三是因為台幣四千八這個價格能買到 UGREEN Nexode 三千二就給你 200W 的版本。如果行動電源接 Find My 對你很重要就買，否則 UGREEN 才是理性選擇。

Zendure SuperTank Pro 26,800mAh 100W 排第十，是真的需要四個 USB-C 同時用的小眾選擇。USB-C 韌體更新這個功能在這個價位只有 Zendure 在做。2026 年六千四的定價讓 CP 值算不過去，因為 Anker Prime 250W 和 UGREEN Nexode 200W 都用更低價格給你更多總瓦數。除非你真的需要四台 USB-C 裝置從同一塊行動電源充電，不然挑兩孔但餘裕更多的對手才是對的。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W 是 2026 年只能挑一台時我會直接買的行動電源
highlights.body: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh 剛好卡在美國 FAA 規定能上飛機的最高容量上限，250W PD 3.1 合計輸出能讓 16 吋 MacBook Pro 用滿載 140W 輸入快充，同時還能留 110W 給兩支手機。Anker App 加上找電源警報是這個品類最完整的智慧充電軟體。彩色螢幕顯示真實的輸入輸出瓦數，不是大多數行動電源亂掰的百分比。台幣五千八雖然比 737 貴，但解決的是不同的問題：這是唯一一台可以從機場板凳上同時餵飽筆電、兩支手機、平板的單一裝置。

highlights.title: PD 3.1 改變了筆電級行動電源的定義，只有三台真的跟上了
highlights.body: USB-C PD 3.1 在 2024 年底把單孔上限從 100W 拉到 240W，市場花了十八個月才真的做出超過 140W 的行動電源。Anker Prime 250W、Anker 737 140W、UGREEN Nexode 200W 是我會放心拿來給 16 吋 MacBook Pro 滿載快充的三台。2026 年還在標『100W max』的行動電源是這個市場已經不需要做的妥協。如果你打算花超過台幣兩千五買行動電源，答案就是這三台之一，否則數學算不過。

highlights.title: 內建 USB-C 線是 2026 年日常隨身的最低標準
highlights.body: Anker Nano 10K、INIU 20,000mAh、Baseus PicoGo 都是內建 USB-C 線設計，跟另外帶一條線的日常使用差距非常大。你直接消滅了「線忘在廚房檯面、包裡只剩一塊沒用的鋰電池磚頭」這個失敗模式。Anker Nano 還把線當吊繩用，這種真的有思考過的設計才值得品牌溢價。2026 年買沒有內建線的行動電源等於要你帶兩個配件做一個配件就能解決的事情。

highlights.title: Qi2.2 25W 只對 iPhone 16 和 17 有意義，其他 iPhone 都卡在 15W Qi2
highlights.body: Apple 是在手機端鎖無線充電速度，不是行動電源端鎖。iPhone 12 到 15 不管你接哪台 Qi2.2 行動電源都硬體上限 15W。只有 iPhone 16 和 17 才真的吃得到 Baseus PicoGo AM52 的 25W 天花板。如果你還在用 iPhone 15 或更舊，Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 台幣 1,990 給你跟台幣 2,500 的 Baseus 一模一樣的實際無線充電速度，省下的錢留著升級手機。買行動電源要對著手機規格買，不是對著規格表買。

highlights.title: 別買 USB-A 孔和 18,650 電芯的設計，那是上一代的東西
highlights.body: Amazon 上一千到兩千台幣的 18,650 圓柱電芯行動電源還是滿坑滿谷，自己回充很慢、給手機充也慢、瓦時數一樣的情況下機身比 21700 或軟包電芯大一截。USB-A 孔還活著只是為了相容舊線材，但現代手機、筆電、平板、AirPods 充電盒全部都吃 USB-C。2026 年買行動電源就要 21700 電芯、純 USB-C 輸出、支援 PD 3.1，不然你是用今年的價格買去年的產品。唯一例外是包裡的舊 USB-A 線真的還在用，那就忍 18 個月再換。

references.title: The best power banks and portable chargers for every device in 2026
The best portable chargers of 2026, tried and tested
Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 batteries review

en.commentary: Travel and outdoor season buying intent is hitting peak and the 2026 portable charger ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Anker Prime 27650 250W keeps first because the 250W bidirectional output, 27,650mAh capacity, and Anker's Smart Display deliver everything a power user needs for laptop charging on the go. At $179 it's premium, but the dual USB-C 140W ports actually run two MacBook Pros at full charging speed simultaneously, which no competitor matches. The Anker 737 PowerCore 24K stays second on the strength of the 24,000mAh capacity and 140W output at the now-discounted $99 street price, making it the value pick for users who don't strictly need 250W. The UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W takes third because the price-to-capacity ratio at $129 undercuts both Anker options while delivering 200W output that handles MacBook Pro charging adequately. The pattern in 2026 is that 100W or higher PD output has become table stakes for any portable charger pitched at laptop users, and 30W or lower legacy units have been pushed entirely into the impulse-buy phone-only segment. Memorial Day pricing on the Anker Prime is dropping toward $149 and that's the sharpest deal of the year.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27650 250W is the only portable charger I'd put in my own travel kit
highlights.body: 250W bidirectional output, 27,650mAh capacity, dual USB-C 140W ports that run two MacBook Pros at full speed simultaneously, and Anker's Smart Display that actually delivers useful information. At a Memorial Day target of $149 this is the easiest portable-charger recommendation of the year.

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K is the value pick for laptop users
highlights.body: 24,000mAh capacity, 140W PD output that charges a MacBook Pro 14 at full speed, and the now-discounted $99 street price that undercuts most 100W competitors. For users who don't strictly need 250W output, this is the smart spend.

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W is the value play in the high-output tier
highlights.body: Price-to-capacity ratio at $129 undercuts comparable Anker options, 200W output handles MacBook Pro charging without compromise, and the build quality has finally caught up to the major brands. For users who want 200W output without paying premium pricing, this is the right pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 旅遊跟戶外季買氣到高峰，2026 年行動電源排行沒變動，前段班的位置都實打實。第一名 Anker Prime 27650 250W 守住，250W 雙向輸出、27,650mAh 容量、Anker Smart Display 顯示，外出筆電充電需要的全部到位。NT$5,500 上下是高階定價，但雙 USB-C 140W 埠能同時讓兩台 MacBook Pro 全速充電，沒有對手能做到。第二名 Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 守得住，24,000mAh 容量加 140W 輸出，現在街價 NT$3,000 上下是不堅持要 250W 的人的性價比選擇。第三名 UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W，容量價格比 NT$3,990 比 Anker 兩款都便宜，200W 輸出對 MacBook Pro 充電完全夠用。2026 年的脈絡是 100W 以上 PD 輸出變成定位筆電使用者行動電源的最低門檻，30W 以下傳統款被完全擠到衝動購買的純手機段。Memorial Day 期間 Anker Prime 通路會壓到 NT$4,500 上下，是今年最划算的選擇。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27650 250W 是我唯一會放進旅行包的行動電源
highlights.body: 250W 雙向輸出、27,650mAh 容量、雙 USB-C 140W 埠能同時讓兩台 MacBook Pro 全速充電、Smart Display 提供實用資訊。Memorial Day 通路目標價 NT$4,500，是今年最容易推的行動電源。

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 是筆電族性價比
highlights.body: 24,000mAh 容量、140W PD 輸出能讓 MacBook Pro 14 全速充電、現在街價 NT$3,000 上下比大部分 100W 對手便宜。不堅持要 250W 輸出的使用者，這是聰明的選擇。

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W 是高輸出段性價比
highlights.body: 容量價格比 NT$3,990 比 Anker 同等級便宜，200W 輸出對 MacBook Pro 充電不妥協，做工終於追上大廠。想要 200W 輸出又不想付高階定價的使用者，這是正解。
